title: SOFTWARE-HERITAGE — SOVEREIGN-TRACE-PROTOCOL
entry: Software Heritage archive submission completed March 10, 2026. Repository: github.com/AionSystem/SOVEREIGN-TRACE-PROTOCOL. Submitted to archive.softwareheritage.org - largest software source code archive in the world, run by Inria and UNESCO. Permanent independent timestamp. Cited in patent proceedings. Author: Sheldon K. Salmon.
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
